# leifwind_entity_fragments (Data Source)

Read-only fragment names of an entity (derived from its FRAGMENT-connection fields).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List the fragment names derived from an entity's FRAGMENT-connection
# fields.
data "leifwind_entity_fragments" "book_fragments" {
  project_id  = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  entity_name = "book"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_name` (String) Entity name (or UUID string).
- `project_id` (String) Project id (UUID).

### Read-Only

- `fragments` (List of String)
